item.title: Bond investors shift to neutral ahead of Warsh's Fed debut
item.author: EBR European Business Report
item.description: "There are growth concerns toward the second half of this year and we don't feel that with the Iran war, inflation right now has improved growth prospects," said George Catrambone, head of fixed income, Americas at DWS. These concerns are also shaping expectations around how the Fed communicates its policy stance.
